title: sida montana f. regnellii
intro: Sida montana f. regnellii, also known as the Mountain Sida, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains various compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing swelling and improving immune function. The Mountain Sida can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
